name: Tropical Chicken Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken Breast Halves (4 oz each, skinned, boned, cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lime juice, vegetable oil, and honey in a shallow dish.
2. Add chicken; toss gently until evenly coated.
3. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 8 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove chicken from marinade, reserving the marinade.
5. Thread alternating pieces of chicken, onion, pepper, papaya, and pineapple onto 6 (12") skewers.
6. Coat a grill rack with Pam cooking spray.
7. Place the rack on the grill over medium-hot coals.
8. Cook kabobs for 15-20 minutes or until fully cooked, turning occasionally and basting frequently with reserved marinade.
